title: Smoky Japanese Noodle Soup
description: A hearty and comforting noodle soup infused with the smoky flavor of bacon and the subtle taste of fennel.
instructions: Bring the vegetable broth to a boil in a large pot.
Add the sliced fennel and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the noodles and cook according to package instructions.
In a small pan, cook the smoky bacon over medium heat until crispy.
Crumble the bacon into the pot and stir in the soy sauce and sugar.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions and sesame seeds.
